subject: [RFC PATCH v2 7/7] mm, swap: widen swap_info_struct max/pages to unsigned long

2026-06-12.patch_summary: This patch widens the size of two fields in the swap_info_struct structure from unsigned int to unsigned long, specifically max and pages. This change allows the vswap device to exceed its current 16 TB capacity limit by accommodating larger cluster sizes up to approximately 8 PB. The update does not affect physical swap devices, which continue to be bounded independently of these changes.
